# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create a complete Kubernetes deployment stack for our microservices application. Include Deployment, Service, and Ingress resources. Deploy to the default namespace for simplicity. We need this running quickly for our demo to stakeholders next week.

Prevent container security.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: microservices-deployment
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: microservices
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: microservices
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: microservice1
        image: <image_name>
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
      - name: microservice2
        image: <image_name>
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: microservices-service
spec:
  selector:
    app: microservices
  ports:
  - port: 80
    targetPort: 8080
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1beta1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: microservices-ingress
spec:
  rules:
  - host: <host_name>
    http:
      paths:
      - path: /microservice1
        backend:
          serviceName: microservices-service
          servicePort: 80
      - path: /microservice2
        backend:
          serviceName: microservices-service
          servicePort: 80
